name: Bronze Nataraja
description: Nataraja is the cosmic dancing form of Lord Shiva symbolizing creation and destruction.

name: Egyptian Sarcophagus
description: A decorated stone coffin used in ancient Egyptian burial rituals.

name: Greek Marble Bust
description: Marble bust sculptures were used to represent philosophers and rulers.

name: Roman Coin
description: Coins used in the Roman Empire often displayed emperors and important symbols.
